{ "name": "@babel/helper-module-imports", "version": "7.28.6", "description": "Babel helper functions for inserting module loads", "author": "The Babel Team (https://babel.dev/team)", "homepage": "https://babel.dev/docs/en/next/babel-helper-module-imports", "license": "MIT", "publishConfig": { "access": "public" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/babel/babel.git", "directory": "packages/babel-helper-module-imports" }, "main": "./lib/index.js", "dependencies": { "@babel/traverse": "^7.28.6", "@babel/types": "^7.28.6" }, "devDependencies": { "@babel/core": "^7.28.6" }, "engines": { "node": ">=6.9.0" }, "type": "commonjs" }
